# cameraDeviceCanTakePicture

**Type Property**

The capability for the client to request to take a picture while the camera is connected.

## Declaration

```swift
static let cameraDeviceCanTakePicture: ICDeviceCapability
```

## Discussion

When this capability is available, the client can call [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICCameraDevice/requestTakePicture()] to capture a picture.

## Taking Pictures

- **cameraDeviceCanTakePictureUsingShutterReleaseOnCamera**: The capability to capture a picture if the user presses the shutter release on the camera while the camera is connected.
